inputs.rowSource: motion-trace-alignment.csv rows joined to trace.csv by traceSequence

specs.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, CPU compact search

current product DistilledMLP lag0 offset -4ms with post-stop brake
v20 rule: recentHigh>=400, v5<=300, latestDelta<=2.5; snap to current while latched
v20 rule: recentHigh>=400, v2<=150, latestDelta<=2.0; cap prediction magnitude to 0.5 px while latched

conclusionHints.conservativeGate: No candidate should be considered product-ready unless it improves balanced stop-event risk without degrading normal visual p95/p99 on the untouched normal test split.
